11.name: DEMO - Patch RHEL Servers
11.description: Apply package updates to RHEL web servers. Job stdout and the portal package-summary template show per-node package names. Survey options: security-only patching and optional reboot.

12.name: DEMO - OpenSCAP Scan
12.description: Run CIS OpenSCAP compliance scan on RHEL web servers and generate HTML/XML reports.

13.name: DEMO - OpenSCAP Remediate
13.description: Remediate auto-fixable CIS controls using a demo tailored profile; stdout shows full CIS baseline (~97%) and demo profile before/after scores (target 100%).

14.name: DEMO - Deploy Web Application
14.description: Deploy Apache httpd with environment-specific content on RHEL web servers. Job stdout and the portal deploy-summary template show per-node packages, stage, services, URL, and content.

15.name: DEMO - Verify Web Application
15.description: Verify deployed web applications return HTTP 200 with expected content. Job stdout and the portal verify-summary template show per-node URL, HTTP status, stage, and content snippet.

16.name: DEMO - RHEL Operations Pipeline
16.description: End-to-end RHEL operations pipeline: patch, OpenSCAP scan, remediate, deploy web app, and verify.
